Crashes Involving Parties 70+ (SF)
  Elderly-Involved Crash Location

SF Population Rate (70+): 11.9%
Observed Crash Rate (70+): 5.45%
Relative Risk: 0.46x (95% CI: 0.44-0.47)
Statistically Significant: Yes (p=< 0.0001)
Conclusion: Compared to their 11.9% demographic representation in San Francisco, parties aged 70 or older are involved in injury crashes at a significantly lower rate.
